user.title: Proscenic Cloud Login
user.description: Enter your {app_name} app credentials to automatically discover your vacuum and retrieve the local key.

select_device.title: Select Device
select_device.description: Select your Proscenic vacuum from the list of discovered devices.

confirm_ip.title: Confirm IP Address
confirm_ip.description: We found an IP address for {device_name}. Please confirm or modify it.

manual_ip.title: Enter IP Address
manual_ip.description: We couldn't automatically detect the IP address for {device_name}. Please enter it manually. You can find this in your router's connected devices list.

manual.title: Manual Configuration
manual.description: Enter your vacuum's connection details manually. You can obtain these using the tinytuya wizard or tuya-uncover tool.

reconfigure.title: Update device connection
reconfigure.description: Update LAN settings for {device_name}. Device ID (unchanged): {device_id}

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the vacuum. Please check the IP address and ensure the device is online.
error.no_devices: No devices found in your Proscenic account

abort.unique_id_mismatch: This device does not match the existing configuration

init.title: Proscenic Options
init.description: Choose what you want to change.

device_connection.title: Update device connection
device_connection.description: Update LAN settings for {device_name}. Device ID (unchanged): {device_id}
